name: Clueo MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from the Clueo Foundation for the Clueo platform — focused on structured reasoning and knowledge management capabilities. Enables AI agents to access Clueo's reasoning infrastructure, query structured knowledge, and leverage Clueo's analytical tools for enhanced AI reasoning workflows.
use_cases: Accessing Clueo structured reasoning capabilities from AI agents
Querying Clueo knowledge base from research and analysis agents
Enhancing AI reasoning workflows with Clueo analytical tools
Integrating Clueo foundation capabilities into MCP-based agent systems
not_for: Teams not familiar with or using the Clueo platform
Simple knowledge retrieval use cases without structured reasoning needs
High-volume production workloads without established Clueo relationship
best_when: A research or AI team using the Clueo Foundation platform wants to integrate Clueo's structured reasoning capabilities into their MCP-based AI agent workflows.
avoid_when: You don't have a relationship with Clueo Foundation. Limited public documentation makes independent assessment difficult — evaluate the Clueo platform separately before adopting this MCP.

auth.notes: Clueo API credentials required. Register with Clueo Foundation for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Depends on Clueo Foundation access program
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Clueo platform access required — contact Clueo Foundation.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by Clueo API access tier

known_agent_gotchas: Clueo Foundation is a niche platform — limited public documentation for external evaluation
API access requires Clueo Foundation registration — evaluate platform fit before adopting
ClueoFoundation org indicates official status but limited ecosystem documentation
68 stars is modest — verify active community and platform longevity before depending on it
agent_readiness.security_notes: API key auth to Clueo platform. HTTPS. Limited public security documentation — request security details from Clueo Foundation.

security_score_components.security_notes: API key auth. HTTPS. Limited public security info. Request security documentation from Clueo Foundation.
